name: Mobile Suit Gundam GQuuuuuuX -Beginning- (Subbed)
summary: High-schooler Amate Yuzuriha is drawn into epic battles and a new era with a mysterious Gundam and its pilot in her space colony.

name: LFF Spotlight on Karim Rahbani
summary: A spotlight on award-winning filmmaker Karim Rahbani, from Lebanon’s legendary Rahbani family.
